title: Spicy Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A flavorful and comforting soup originating from Malaysia, made with tender chicken, soft noodles, and a hint of spice.

ingredients.name: restorative noodles
ingredients.notes: preferably rice noodles or egg noodles

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger, and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, coconut milk, fish sauce, and sugar. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Add the noodles to the pot and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until they are tender.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped herbs or scallions if desired.
